module.name: Quotes
module.description: Quote workflow from pricing and customer approval through order conversion.

confirm.title: Mark quote as sent?
confirm.body: Use this once the commercial quote has actually been shared with the customer.

confirm.title: Mark quote as accepted?
confirm.body: Use this once the customer has accepted the quote and the deal is ready for order conversion.

confirm.title: Create order from quote?
confirm.body: This will create an Order and copy the accepted quote lines.

modals.title: Mark Quote Lost
modals.description: Capture why the quote was lost before moving it out of the active pipeline.

modals.title: Mark Quote Expired
modals.description: Capture the expiry note before closing this quote out of the live pipeline.
